atorvastatin|clarithromycin.mechanism: Clarithromycin may increase atorvastatin exposure through CYP3A4 inhibition.
atorvastatin|clarithromycin.effect: Increased risk of statin-associated muscle toxicity.
atorvastatin|clarithromycin.recommendation: Avoid combination or use a non-CYP3A4 statin alternative if clinically appropriate.

simvastatin|clarithromycin.mechanism: Clarithromycin may increase simvastatin exposure through CYP3A4 inhibition.
simvastatin|clarithromycin.effect: Increased risk of statin-associated muscle toxicity.

aspirin|ibuprofen.mechanism: Concurrent NSAID exposure may increase gastrointestinal adverse effects.
aspirin|ibuprofen.recommendation: Use together only with clinician review.

warfarin|ibuprofen.mechanism: Anticoagulant plus NSAID exposure may increase bleeding risk.
warfarin|ibuprofen.recommendation: Avoid combination unless specifically directed and monitored.

lisinopril|ibuprofen.mechanism: NSAIDs may reduce antihypertensive effect and affect renal perfusion.
lisinopril|ibuprofen.effect: Reduced blood pressure control and possible renal function impact.
lisinopril|ibuprofen.recommendation: Monitor blood pressure and renal function.
